top_signals.title: India RBI to Inject $5 Billion Equivalent Cash Via Swap Auction
top_signals.summary: India’s central bank will inject liquidity to the equivalent of $5 billion via a swap auction, it said in a statement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Graphite One secures site for Alaska-Ohio supply chain
top_signals.summary: The company’s flagship Graphite Creek project in Alaska is described by the US Geological Survey as the largest graphite deposit in the country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
